إرفـلي يا بنت بالمجد الطـويـل
ياأم الأعيان اللي شروا الليل سود
وإقبلي مختـالة وْ فِلّي اليـديل 
دامِك إنتِ في حِما سْباع و أسود

كَفّـهم في اليود له مَِـدٍ جزيـل
وْصبرهم حِكمة ولكن له حدود
وإن نِفَذ صبر الحليم الويل ويل
يحذَر إعداه إن تِبَع برقه رعـود

حِن هَل الخيل وْهَل السيف الصقيل
للصديق ذْراع و للـعـايل لحـود
وإقهَوَتنا إمحَمّسه مجدٍ و هيل
لو نِهِز فنـيـالها نـنـفِض حشود

الأسد صمتـه مهـابـة و الدليل
خشمه إن شَمّ الخطر حوله ينود
ياكِل كْبـود العِدى نـيـّة وْ يزيل
عن حِماه اللي قربها مْن الوجود

snippet.title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji First Look  Hindi Teaser | Ritiesh D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
For the land that forged warriors. 
For the faith that never wavered. 
For the dream of Swarajya that lived in every heart… 
With deep reverence to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj,  we proudly unveil the first look teaser of Raja Shivaji — India’s Greatest Warrior King. 👑 
 Our King. Our Pride. Our Legacy. 🚩 
 Directed by Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh. 
#RajaShivaji In cinemas on 1st May 2026 in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed by: Riteish Deshmukh
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande & Genelia Deshmukh
Music: Ajay-Atul 
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (Asc, Isc)
Story screenplay: Ajit wadekar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Aak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Choreographer: Remo D’souza
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Sound Mixing
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Re-recording mixer:
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of one of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi, and Telugu.
 
1st May 2026
In Cinemas
A Jio Studios Release

من ايام المحبه تاخذ الذكرى جروح وروح
انا ادري ذكريات الحب تهب ومالها يمه 

تعداني الطريق وتاهت الخطوة ضما وشحوح
ولا ساقي على قلبي حنين ويجلي الغمة

انا لي كبرياء جامح ولا يعرف مدى وطموح
يموت بعزه ويولد من العزه على القمه

ذكرت ان السنين اللي بقربك ما تسر الروح
سرابك غرني واحسب بياخذني من العتمه
 - 

سريت بعزتي قادر ولو فيني بقايا جروح 
يقديني الشموخ اللي من الامه ولا همه

بتذكر قيمة احساسي وتبكيني قهر وتنوح 
وانا ماني ابد مثلك جحود وبايع الذمه 

فمان الله والذكرى بتبقى والجروح تروح 
انا من يوم فارقتك وانا والله في نعمه

معك ضدي وقفت وقلت فتره تنتهي وتروح 
وانا اليوم البعيد اللي عطر لقياه ما تشمه

snippet.title: Boney M. - Rasputin (Disco In The Snow, 09.04.1979)
snippet.description:
Boney M. performing "Rasputin" at Disco In The Snow in 1979. 

You can listen to all songs of Boney M. here: https://lnk.to/BoneyM 

Subscribe to the channel and activate notifications: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJOXLX2b_uMEct1r5F4PMXQ
► https://www.facebook.com/BoneyM.de 
► https://www.instagram.com/boneym.official/
► https://www.tiktok.com/@boneym.official

Footage licensed from BBC Studios Distribution. All rights reserved.
___________________________________________

Lyrics:

There lived a certain man in Russia long ago
He was big and strong, in his eyes a flaming glow
Most people looked at him with terror and with fear
But to Moscow chicks he was such a lovely dear
He could preach the bible like a preacher
Full of ecstasy and fire
But he also was the kind of teacher
Women would desire

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen
There was a cat that really was gone
RA RA RASPUTIN
Russia's greatest love machine
It was a shame how he carried on

He ruled the Russian land and never mind the Czar
But the kasachok he danced really wunderbar
In all affairs of state he was the man to please
But he was real great when he had a girl to squeeze
For the queen he was no wheeler dealer
Though she'd heard the things he'd done
She believed he was a holy healer
Who would heal her son

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen
There was a cat that really was gone
RA RA RASPUTIN
Russia's greatest love machine
It was a shame how he carried on

But when his drinking and lusting and his hunger
For power became known to more and more people
The demands to do something about this outrageous
Man became louder and louder

"This man's just got to go!" declared his enemies
But the ladies begged "Don't you try to do it, please"
No doubt this Rasputin had lots of hidden charms
Though he was a brute they just fell into his arms
Then one night some men of higher standing
Set a trap, they're not to blame
"Come to visit us" they kept demanding
And he really came

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen
They put some poison into his wine
RA RA RASPUTIN
Russia's greatest love machine
He drank it all and he said "I feel fine"

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen
They didn't quit, they wanted his head
RA RA RASPUTIN
Russia's greatest love machine
And so they shot him till he was dead

Oh, those Russians...


#BoneyM #Rasputin

snippet.title: DIAZZA – Dream (Original Mix) [2026]
snippet.description:
Escape into a world of neon nostalgia and ethereal soundscapes.
Experience "Dream," the latest Original Mix by DIAZZA. This track blends the classic pulse of Italo Disco with a modern, ambient twist. Featuring airy, whispered female vocals and a melancholic yet relaxing rhythm, "Dream" creates a deep emotional atmosphere.

Whether you're driving through the city at night or looking for the perfect chill-out vibe, let the soft reverbs and gentle delays of DIAZZA take you away.

👇👇👇「 ✦ DIAZZA ✦ 」: 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝗺𝗲 👇👇👇
ᯤ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/13QwIrk208e7D8i5wPPWkI?si=vLyVnTqVQXeMZobN1po4jw
♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/us/artist/diazza/1817497287
♫ Yandex Music - https://music.yandex.ru/artist/24284976?ref_id=6B974D74-E058-4012-822F-0B014484B3CF&utm_medium=copy_link

🎶 Music inspired by : Danekoo1
🧾 Text & Musical Arrangement: KorgStyle Life
🎤 Vocals: DIAZZA
🎥 Video: Licensed production


📜 Lyrics:
(Whispered) "In a dream… I feel you close… Stay… don’t fade away…"

[Verse 1]
Softly falling into you,
Every touch feels warm and true.
Hearts are moving slow in time,
Yours forever next to mine.

[Chorus]
In this dream… hold me near,
Everything feels so clear.
If I wake… don’t let me go,
You’re the only truth I know.

[Verse 2]
Every moment drifts so deep,
Like a promise we could keep.
In your arms I lose control,
You’re the rhythm of my soul.

[Final Chorus]
In this dream… stay with me,
Where our hearts are meant to be.
Through the night… soft and slow,
Love is all we need to know.

(Outro) "Just a dream… Stay with me…"

🎧 Recommended For:
Italo Disco Lovers: Fans of nostalgic synths and melodic basslines.
Chill & Study: Perfect background music for focus or relaxation.
Dream Pop Enthusiasts: If you love airy, ethereal female vocals.

🏷️ Support the Artist:
If you enjoyed the vibe, please Like, Subscribe, and hit the Bell icon 🔔 to stay updated with new releases from DIAZZA and the KorgStyle Life project.

#DIAZZA #Dream #ItaloDisco #RelaxingMusic #DreamPop #ElectronicMusic2026 #Danekoo1 #KorgStyleLife #LicentedProduction #NewMusic #Synthwave #AtmosphericMusic

April 5, 2026 11:15 PM(JST)

After a daring escape from the Future Island Egghead, the Straw Hat Crew set their course for a legendary destination. Joined by the mighty Giant Warrior Pirates, they finally reach Elbaph, the long-awaited Land of Giants.

snippet.title: كليب أغنية (محمود يقلب حوده ) - حوده / (Official Music Video) | انتاج سلطان الشن 2026
snippet.description:
القناة الرسمية لسلطان الشن
ـــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــــ

Subscribe to Sultan Elshan | إشترك في قناة سلطان الشن لمشاهدة أحدث الأغاني حصرياً 

https://www.youtube.com/@sultanelshanofficial

لسماع الأغنية على جميع المنصات 👇 
https://ummsultan.lnk.to/MYH

ــــــــــــــــــــــــــــ

Producer: Sultan Elshan | انتاج :سلطان الشن

Lyrics: Hussein Khaled | كلمات :حسين خالد

Composed: Hussein Khaled | الحان :حسين خالد 

Music Arrangement: khodary | توزيع :خضري

Social Media Manager: Hanan Yaser | سوشيال ميديا مانجر : حنان ياسر

Social Media Houda Bondok : Amr Filo  | سوشيال ميديا حوده بندق :عمرو فيلو

Visuals Team: Ahmed Mohamed -  Petro

Graphic Designer: Ahmed Mohamed (404) | مصمم جرافيك :أحمد محمد 

 Motion Graphic: Petro  | موشن جرافيك : بيترو

Produced:  Elshan Production | انتاج : الشن للانتاج الفني

Production Manager: Mohamed Abu Elsayed | مدير انتاج :محمد ابو السيد

Video by  apescreations
@islamhisham 
@mohamedhisham 
@sara.ramsis
@mvbakar

*************************************************
الكلمات :
هما فين اللي اتحدوا 
لما شافوني ليه اتخضوا 
جيت ف الباقي خد بعضه ف ظرف ثواني و قال يا فكيك 

اللي قالوا مفيش منهم 
حد يقولي أنا فينهم 
سبحان من سكتهم بعد ما كانوا نازلين تنطيط


من صغري الهيبه ديا 
و الله مولوده فيا 
أنا مش حاجة عادية
ده أنا فوق الجمدان 

دوروا ملاقوش مني 
ف اختاروا يغيروا مني 
ياللي بتتغاظوا مني 
اتغاظوا حبه كمان


ريس و ماليش ريس 
كله عارفني كويس 
علشان أنا متميز ف عيونهم كلها عليا 

ماتشوفش اني خاربها 
ده أنا من تحت جايبها 
دلوقتي أنا كبيرها و كلهم بقوا لازقيين فيا 


اللي يجزو يجزو 
لسه الوحش بعزو 
ولا شاغله ولا يهزو
مهما قالوا الحاقدين 

عارف اللي موترهم 
اني خاطف انظارهم 
اصلي التوب ف كارهم 
و الباقي مش باينين 


بكرا تجوني و تحنوا 
و أنا أقول لا مفيش منه 
ما أنا مش ناسي أفعالكم و هرد الضربه بألف 

أنا وحياة غلاوتكوا
ما طايق حتي سيرتكوا
ابعدوا يصلح حالكم كله طابور يرجع للخلف 


أنا لو فل رصيدي
يابا كان كله هييجي 
كانوا هيبوسوا علي إيدي 
يمكن ارش عليهم 

بس أنا حيلتي رجوله 
في زمن في معدومه 
زمن الكام هلهوله  
بقوا بيشوفوا نفسيهم 


لو مصلحه موجوده 
محمود يقلب حوده  
يا خسارتك يا رجوله ضيعتي ف زمن الاستوريهات

مبدأهم دلوقتي 
بتحبني علقلي 
و أنا مش هعمل عقلي بعقلهم مش ناقصه عيال 


واجهه و قيمه و قامه 
بيقولوا عني زعامه
أنا اسمي يلا علامه
مش محتاج للسيط 


مش زنبي اني حارقكوا
زنبي اني اجمد منكوا 
أنا بس اللي شاغلكوا 
و انتوا ماتشغلونيش 



خلي و اخويا و زميلي 
ياسطا انت اللي صافيلي 
انت يلا اللي باقيلي ف كوكب بقي معدوم سلكان

أنا انت مش أنا و انت 
انت الشق يا حته 
عمري ما أسيبك مفيش غيرك ف القلب يا شن 


علي وضعك يا توينزي
صفقة عمري يا كنزي 
يالي حاببني لنفسي 
مش علشان حاجه تاني 


علي مبدأنا الثابت 
بيقولوا عننا واحد 
عمرنا ما بنتجاحد 
ولا يشغلنا أسامي
